raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California Indian Nations College (CINC) is seeking to become the only federally accredited tribal college in California.",
    "Federal accreditation is often required for transferring student credits to other institutions.",
    "California has the greatest numbers of Native Americans in the nation but lacks an accredited tribal college.",
    "Native American students have the lowest college-going rate of any college group in California, with less than one percent of students in both the University of California and California State University systems.",
    "Earning federal accreditation requires an institution to meet standards set by the accrediting agency in areas such as academic quality, financial stability, and governance.",
    "The accreditation process includes a comprehensive self-evaluation, peer review, and ongoing monitoring.",
    "The process of gaining accreditation may take a few years and requires a sizeable investment by the institution."
  ]
}
```
